subject: AirDrop not discovering nearby devices
description: User tries to AirDrop a photo to a nearby colleague's iPhone but neither device sees the other in the share sheet.

ts_steps.title: Enable discoverability
ts_steps.action: Both devices: Settings → General → AirDrop → set to 'Everyone for 10 Minutes' (or 'Contacts Only' if both in each other's contacts); ensure Bluetooth and Wi-Fi are on.

ts_steps.title: Disable Personal Hotspot
ts_steps.action: Settings → Personal Hotspot → toggle off on both devices; Personal Hotspot uses the same radios and blocks AirDrop discovery.

ts_steps.title: Toggle airplane mode
ts_steps.action: Turn Airplane Mode on, wait 5 seconds, turn off; this resets Wi-Fi and Bluetooth radios. Retry AirDrop from the share sheet.

internal_information: AirDrop uses a combination of Bluetooth LE for discovery and peer-to-peer Wi-Fi for transfer. Firewall or content restriction profiles can disable AirDrop but that is a policy setting, not a device bug.
